# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  - type: compute.v1beta2.disk
    name: '{{ resource_name }}-pd',
    properties:
      name:'{{ resource_name }}-pd',
      zone:'us-central1-f',
      type:'compute.googleapis.com/Disk'
      sizeGb:{
        $ref: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2018-05-01/deploymentParameters.json#/definitions/Int"
      },
  - type: compute.v1beta2.instance
    name: '{{ resource_name }}',
    properties:
      machineType:{
        $ref:'https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2018-05-01/deploymentParameters.json#/definitions/String'
      },
      disks:[
        {
          initializeParams:{
            sourceImage:'debian-9-stretch-v20180730',
            diskEncryptionKey:{
              $ref:"https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2015-06-15/compute.json#/definitions/DiskEncryptionKey"
            }
          },
          mode:'READ_WRITE'
        }
      ],
